title: Kings Bay Season Opening Ceremony
content: Kings Bay youth baseball season opening ceremony will be held on April 19th. We will have a parade! Time and location to be announced soon. Please stay tuned for more details.

title: First Game!
content: We will be hosting the Kings Bay Cobras for our first game of the season on April 19th at 1:00 PM. The game will be held at KB1 Field. Come out and support the team!
